title: Rogan suggests upcoming UFO disclosure is cynical distraction from war in Iran
Nick Pope, UFO sleuth who chased the truth, dies at 60.
Trump UFO Files 'To Begin Releasing Tomorrow At 3PM' After Jeremy Corbell Gets White House Briefing Call
description: Filmmaker Jeremy Corbell claims White House sources confirmed the gradual release of UFO files, sparking debate over transparency and secrecy in the U.S. government.

title: Sources in the White House as well as Congressional members tell me and @G_Knapp that the Presidential UFO file release will begin tomorrow
description: "Just now... sources in the White House as well as Congressional members tell me and @G_Knapp that the Presidential UFO file release will begin tomorrow. We are told it will be slow and steady at first. Nothing shocking initially. Let's see where this goes! This is VERY encouraging - that this administration is following through. More data means more leverage for those of us fighting for UAP transparency. SLEEPING DOG exists because our government chose silence over transparency - that might be changing."

title: UGent activists now occupy UFO building
